meta.title: The daily word game
meta.description: Play Wordle in 80+ languages — from Arabic to Yoruba, the largest multilingual Wordle. Word definitions, no ads, no login. Daily puzzle plus 8 game modes.
meta.keywords: english, puzzle, word, play, game, online, guess, daily

unlimited.title: Unlimited — Play with no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in English. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — Race the Clock Word Game
speed.description: Solve as many words as you can before time runs out. Each correct guess adds bonus time. Build combos for higher scores. A fast-paced twist on the daily word puzzle — free to play.

dordle.title: Dordle — 2 boards at once
dordle.description: Play Dordle in English. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.title: Tridle — 3 boards at once
tridle.description: Play Tridle in English. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.title: Quordle — 4 boards at once
quordle.description: Play Quordle in English. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

octordle.title: Octordle — 8 boards at once
octordle.description: Play Octordle in English. Solve 8 Wordle boards at once with 13 guesses.

sedecordle.title: Sedecordle — 16 boards at once
sedecordle.description: Play Sedecordle in English. Solve 16 Wordle boards at once with 21 guesses.

duotrigordle.title: Duotrigordle — 32 boards at once
duotrigordle.description: Play Duotrigordle in English. Solve 32 Wordle boards at once with 37 guesses.

semantic.title: Semantic Word Game — Guess by Meaning
semantic.description: Guess the secret word using meaning, not letters. Each guess gets a rank showing how semantically close you are. With compass hints, a meaning map, and 50,000 words. Free daily puzzle — like Contexto and Semantle, but better.

text.no_attempts: You haven't tried any words yet!
text.share_challenge_win: I got today's Wordle in {n}. Can you beat me?
text.share_challenge_lose: I didn't get today's Wordle. Can you?
text.hard_mode_position: Hard mode: {letter} must be in position {position}

help.title: How to Play
help.text_1_2: Each guess must be a valid five letter word. Press the enter button to submit your guess.
help.text_1_3: After you guess, the tiles will change color to indicate which letters of your word are correct or almost correct.
help.text_2_1: is in the word and in the correct location!
help.text_2_2: is in the word, but not in the correct location.
help.text_2_3: is not present in the word you are trying to guess.
help.text_3: A new word will be available each day!
help.speed_explanation: You start with 5 minutes on the clock. Solve words to earn bonus time. Miss a word and you lose 30 seconds.
help.speed_scoring_explanation: Points = (7 − guesses) × 100 × combo multiplier. Consecutive solves build your combo up to 3x. A failed word resets your combo.
help.speed_pressure_explanation: Every 3 words solved, the timer speeds up. The longer you survive, the harder it gets.
help.semantic_subtitle: Find a hidden word by meaning, not letters.
help.semantic_rank_title: Type any word — see its rank
help.semantic_map_explanation: Closer to the center = lower rank = closer in meaning.
help.semantic_oracle_explanation: Unlocked after 5 guesses. One cryptic hint per game.

ui.play_more_languages: Play more languages to see your global stats!

ui.streak_footer: Streak counts classic daily puzzles in any language. Play once a day to keep it going.
ui.mode_daily_desc: One word per day. 6 guesses. The classic.
ui.mode_unlimited_desc: Random words, no limit. Play as much as you want.
ui.mode_speed_desc: Race the clock. Solve as many words as you can before time runs out.
ui.mode_custom_desc: Pick a word, share a link. Challenge your friends.
ui.mode_party_desc: Play the same word with friends. See who solves it fastest.
ui.semantic_compass_empty: Your compass will appear after your first guess.
ui.semantic_compass_no_bearing_sub: The compass can't place this one on a known axis — try a word from a different corner of meaning.
ui.semantic_hint_nudge: The oracle might nudge you in the right direction.
ui.semantic_hint_note: One hint per game. Use it wisely.
ui.semantic_cta_body: Type any word. The closer its meaning to the target, the lower its rank. Rank #1 = found it.
ui.semantic_unavailable: This mode is temporarily unavailable — the word embedding data is being generated. Check back in a few minutes.
ui.game_mode_subtitle: Different ways to play — same language, new challenges.
ui.board_picker_subtitle: Same rules, more boards. Pick your challenge.
ui.animations_desc: Tile flip, bounce, and pop effects
ui.homepage_languages_counting: languages and counting — more added regularly.
ui.homepage_and_more_desc: Octordle, Semantic Explorer, Custom Word, Party Mode — and more coming soon.

seo.mode_desc_semantic: Semantic Explorer is a word-guessing game where you find a hidden word using meaning instead of letters. Each guess receives a rank from 1 to 50,001 based on how semantically close it is to the target. Use compass hints and a meaning map to navigate the space of words. A new puzzle every day — or play unlimited mode for endless practice.

semantic.a: Semantic Explorer is a word-guessing game where you find a hidden word based on meaning. Unlike classic Wordle which uses letter positions, Semantic Explorer ranks your guesses by how close they are in meaning to the target word, using AI word embeddings.

semantic.q: How does it differ from Contexto or Semantle?
semantic.a: Semantic Explorer offers compass hints that tell you which semantic direction to think in (e.g., "think more metallic"), a visual meaning map showing where your guesses land in semantic space, and an oracle hint system. It also supports 50,000+ words including uncommon ones like "defenestration".

Each word in the vocabulary has a position in a high-dimensional semantic space (computed by AI). Your guess is ranked by how close it is to the target word in this space. Rank #1 means you found the exact word. Lower ranks mean closer in meaning.

After 5 guesses, the compass analyzes the direction from your best guess toward the target and gives you two semantic axes to think along — like "think more metallic" or "think more subordinate". This helps narrow down the meaning space.
Yes! A new hidden word is chosen every day, the same for all players worldwide. You can also play unlimited mode for endless practice with random words.

semantic.q: How many guesses do I get?
semantic.a: You get 15 guesses to find the hidden word. After 5 guesses, you unlock the compass hints. You can also use the oracle hint once per game for an extra clue.

speed.a: You start with 5 minutes on the clock. Each word you solve correctly adds bonus time. Build combos by solving consecutive words quickly for score multipliers. The game ends when the timer hits zero.

speed.q: Is there a daily Speed Streak?
speed.a: Yes! The daily Speed Streak uses the same word sequence for all players, so you can compare scores. There is also an unlimited mode with random words.

multiboard.a: Each guess you type applies to ALL boards simultaneously. Green, yellow, and gray feedback appears independently on each board. You need to find all hidden words with a limited number of shared guesses.

Dordle (2 boards, 7 guesses), Quordle (4 boards, 9 guesses), Octordle (8 boards, 13 guesses), Sedecordle (16 boards, 21 guesses), and Duotrigordle (32 boards, 37 guesses). Each has daily and unlimited modes.

semantic.text: Type any English word and press Guess.
Check your rank — lower numbers mean you're closer in meaning.
Watch the meaning map to see where your guesses land relative to the target.
After 5 guesses, use compass hints to find the right semantic direction.
Use the oracle hint once per game if you're stuck.
Find the hidden word (rank #1) in 15 guesses or fewer!

speed.text: Start the countdown and get ready.
Guess the 5-letter word in as few attempts as possible.
Correct words add bonus time to your clock.
Solve consecutive words quickly to build combos for higher scores.
Keep going until the timer runs out!

seo.tips_semantic: Start with broad category words (animal, food, emotion) to narrow the semantic space. Pay attention to compass hints — they point you in the right direction. Words with similar meanings cluster together on the map. Try synonyms of your closest guess. The oracle hint can save you when you're stuck in the wrong corner of meaning space.
seo.mode_desc_speed: Speed Streak is an arcade-style timed word game. Solve 5-letter words as fast as you can — each correct answer adds bonus seconds to your timer. Build combos for multiplied scores. How many can you solve before time runs out?
seo.tips_speed: Start with high-frequency starting words. Speed is more important than finding the perfect guess — a good guess quickly beats a perfect guess slowly. Watch the timer and prioritize common letter patterns.
seo.mode_desc_multiboard: Multi-board Wordle challenges you to solve {boardCount} word puzzles simultaneously with a shared set of guesses. From Dordle (2 boards) to Duotrigordle (32 boards) — each guess applies to every board at once. Strategy is key: maximize information across all boards with each attempt.
